creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jesper Schmitz Mouridsen from comment #11)
Can you reproduce with other consumers like obs-studio, kooha, chromium and other providers like xdg-desktop-portal-luminous, xdg-desktop-portal-hyprland (works under sway but can't share individual windows)? Does force-restarting pipewire and xdg-desktop-portal* processes help? If so there's probably a bug in FreeBSD support within pipewire or xdg-desktop-portal itself as wlroots-based providers like xdg-desktop-portal-wlr don't have much (if any) FreeBSD-specific code.
